3011410.name: Don't Trust
3011410.description:
Don't Trust is a multiplayer horror game about deception. There are a group of survivors on a military base, and one of the survivors is secretly infected. The infected can transform into the survivor form to trick the other players. The infected can also swap players' names to confuse everyone. There is a third role called the General that is responsible for protecting the survivors. He has the power to propose a player for execution to which he believes is suspicious.

Found a bug? Report it through our official bug reporting form. Visit our Community Hub for more details!
3011410.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
